---
title: "Data and Generative AI"
---

## AI in Nephrology: Hands-On Session

## Slides

[View slides in full screen](00_slides.html)

```{=html}
<iframe class="slide-deck" src="00_slides.html" height="420" width="747" style="border: 1px solid #2e3846;"></iframe>
```

### March 17, 2026

::: {.speaker}

![](./images/luca-neri.jpg)

::: {.speaker-text}

<span class="speaker-name">[Luca Neri, MD, PhD](https://renalresearch.com/about/our-team/luca-neri/)</span>
<br>
<span class="speaker-affiliation">Renal Research Institute, New York, NY</span>

:::

:::

::: {.speaker}

![](./images/kurtis-pivert.jpg)

::: {.speaker-text}

<span class="speaker-name">[Kurtis A. Pivert, MS, CAPX](https://data.asn-online.org/)</span>
<br>
<span class="speaker-affiliation">American Society of Nephrology, Washington, DC</span>

:::

:::



### Agenda

|                         |                            |
|-------------------------|----------------------------|
| **9:00 a.m.** | Introduction, Motivation, and Prompting |
| **9:10 a.m.** | [Hands-On Exercise](exercises.qmd#hands-on-exercise-screening-patient-data-for-clinical-trial-eligibility)        |
| **9:20 a.m.** | [Systematic Review Bot](bot.qmd)        |
| **9:40 a.m.** | Wrap-Up                    |
